generators.label: API Mesh config (starter mesh.json)
generators.postNote: Create-only starter mesh. Run `aio api-mesh create mesh.json` to provision, `aio api-mesh update` to apply changes. Keep secrets in runtime params, never inline (commerce-saas/mesh-secrets-in-env).

generators.label: Extension point registration
generators.postNote: Wire this extension point into app.config.yaml under `extensions:` (its $include path points at the generated config). Then `aio app dev` to preview the extension surface.

generators.label: Runtime action
generators.postNote: Register the action in app.config.yaml under runtimeManifest.packages.<pkg>.actions.${actionName} (function: actions/${actionName}/index.js). Then `aio app dev` / `aio app deploy`.

generators.label: Web action (HTTP endpoint)
generators.postNote: Register under runtimeManifest with web: 'yes' and final: true for any required params (aio/web-action-final). Secrets via .env / inputs, never inline (aio/secrets-in-env).

generators.label: Web UI component (React Spectrum)
generators.postNote: React Spectrum component. Wrap your app in <Provider theme={defaultTheme}>. Route to it from App.js; `aio app dev` serves web-src locally.
